summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MANO Real-Time Features (Iteration 6). Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new components working correctly - NotificationCenter, PushNotificationToggle, RealTimeMetrics, WhatsAppManager, APIKeyManager.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect has missing dependency 'connectToStream' - minor code quality issue

passed_tests: POST /api/push/subscribe - Successfully subscribes to push notifications
GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications list with unread_count
POST /api/notifications/read-all - Marks all notifications as read
GET /api/metrics/stream - SSE stream returns real-time metrics
GET /api/api-keys - Returns list of API keys
POST /api/api-keys - Creates new API key with mano_pk_ prefix
GET /api/v1/analyze/status - Public API status endpoint works
Frontend: Dashboard with NotificationCenter - Bell icon with badge visible
Frontend: Profile page with PushNotificationToggle - Toggle switch visible
Frontend: Enterprise Dashboard with RealTimeMetrics - 'En Vivo' indicator working
Frontend: Admin Panel - Tiempo Real tab shows real-time metrics
Frontend: Admin Panel - WhatsApp tab shows message form and queue
Frontend: Admin Panel - API Keys tab shows key management UI
action_items: LOW: Fix ESLint warning in RealTimeMetrics.jsx - add connectToStream to useEffect dependency array or wrap in useCallback
critical_code_review_comments: All new real-time features are properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes
SSE connection in RealTimeMetrics has proper reconnection logic on error
WhatsApp integration correctly shows 'API not configured' message and queues messages
API Keys have proper rate limiting (5 keys max per user) and permission system
seed_data_creation: WhatsApp messages queued during testing, API keys created and cleaned up

mocked_apis.whatsapp_business_api: Messages are queued but not sent - WhatsApp API credentials not configured
mocked_apis.web_push: VAPID keys are development keys - push notifications not actually sent in headless browser

context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time features fully tested: Push notifications (VAPID key, subscribe/unsubscribe), Notifications API (list, mark read, preferences), Metrics (dashboard, SSE stream), WhatsApp (send, queue), API Keys (CRUD). All components have data-testid attributes. Admin Panel has new tabs: Tiempo Real, WhatsApp, API Keys. Enterprise Dashboard shows RealTimeMetrics with 'En Vivo' indicator.
